indexerModel.poolIdentity: bytes32 poolId derived from PoolKey(currency0, currency1, fee, tickSpacing, hooks)
indexerModel.hookField: Pool entities expose the single hook address from PoolKey.hooks
requiredForPoolEntityIndexing: Pool initialized through the PoolManager that Uniswap's Arc subgraph indexes
PoolKey has the intended hook address
PoolId, PoolKey, initialize transaction, and hook permissions are published
Hook address low 14 bits match getHookPermissions flags
requiredForRouterActiveMarket: Quote path is proven against the official Quoter or an explicitly documented custom route

arcTestnet.note: These PoolManagers are valid for local Arc testnet dogfood but will not be indexed by an official Uniswap Arc mainnet subgraph unless Uniswap adopts those exact contracts. Treat them as rehearsal infrastructure.

requiredChecks: Official PoolManager comes from the populated official Arc deployment input.
Official PoolManager does not reuse a self-deployed Arc testnet PoolManager.
FxHedgeHook deploy script mines against an env-provided POOL_MANAGER and has six source pool templates.
FxSwapHook deploy script and salt miner include the current vault-backed FX_VAULT constructor argument.
FxSwapHook batch deploy script remains explicitly vault-backed.
TelaranaGatewayHubHook official deployment uses the CREATE2 runCreate2 permission-bit path.
Each source hook address low-14 bits match the family permission flags before remine/redeploy.

deploymentInputRequiredChecks: Default template stays pending with all official contract addresses unset.
Generator must produce the populated official Arc input directly from the official Uniswap v4 deployments Markdown once Arc appears.
Generator self-test must prove Arc-absent docs stay pending, Arc-present docs produce validator-compatible input, and self-deployed PoolManager reuse fails.
Populated official input must source addresses from the official Uniswap v4 deployments page.
Populated official PoolManager must not reuse a self-deployed Arc testnet PoolManager.
Populated official Permit2 must match the canonical Permit2 address.
When OFFICIAL_ARC_RPC_URL is set, every populated official contract address must have deployed bytecode.

requiredChecks: Official pool count matches the manifest-derived source pool template count.
Each official pool PoolManager equals sourceDeploymentInput.contracts.PoolManager.
No official pool reuses a self-deployed Arc testnet PoolManager.
Official hook address low-14 permission bits match the source hook family.
Each official poolId is unique and derives from its official PoolKey.
Each official family/symbol publication label is unique.
Pool publication fill plan must derive all 11 official pool records from the Arc testnet evidence manifest without inventing readiness evidence.
Router-active claims require firstLiquidityTx, StateView verification, and subgraph verification.
Populated draft files may run offline preflight but cannot be used for official indexing readiness claims.
Populated ready files require OFFICIAL_ARC_RPC_URL and live official PoolManager receipt verification.
Pool publication checker self-test proves populated draft mode passes offline and populated ready mode fails without official RPC receipt verification.
Populated ready files require concrete StateView sqrtPriceX96 and nonzero liquidity evidence for every official pool.
Populated ready files require concrete subgraph id, hooks, token0, token1, feeTier, tickSpacing, price state, and nonzero liquidity evidence for every official pool.
Populated ready files require official exact-input Quoter evidence for FxHedgeHook or an explicit custom-route caveat for non-generic hooks.
Populated ready files require official Universal Router execution evidence for FxHedgeHook or an explicit custom-route caveat for non-generic hook execution.
Populated ready files require receiptVerification.initializeTxVerified=true and receiptVerification.firstLiquidityTxVerified=true after live receipt checks.
When OFFICIAL_ARC_RPC_URL is set, initializeTx must emit the official PoolManager Initialize event for the published PoolKey.
When OFFICIAL_ARC_RPC_URL is set, firstLiquidityTx must emit a positive official PoolManager ModifyLiquidity event for the published poolId.

migrationChecklist: Fetch official Arc PoolManager, PositionManager, UniversalRouter, Quoter, StateView, and Permit2 addresses from Uniswap deployments docs.
Run the official hook remine/redeploy planner and verify all deploy scripts still match the current hook constructors.
Redeploy or remine each hook against the official PoolManager constructor argument.
Initialize pools with official PoolManager.initialize using the target PoolKey and published sqrtPriceX96.
Mint/add liquidity through official periphery or a reviewed Universal Router-compatible path.
Populate the official Arc pool publication input with PoolKey, poolId, initialize tx, first liquidity tx, router/quoter status, router execution evidence, StateView status, and subgraph status.
Publish PoolKey, poolId, initialize tx, first liquidity tx, hook address, hook permission flags, router/quoter support status, and router execution evidence.
Verify pool state through official StateView by poolId.
Verify pools through the official v4 subgraph by poolId and hooks field.

requiredChecks: StateView bytecode exists at the official address
StateView.getSlot0(poolId) returns nonzero sqrtPriceX96 for each official pool
StateView.getLiquidity(poolId) is nonzero before router-active/liquid-market claims
PoolKey fields match published official PoolKey evidence
pool entity exists by official poolId
pool.hooks equals the official hook address
pool token0/token1/feeTier match the official PoolKey
pool tickSpacing matches the official PoolKey
pool liquidity is nonzero before router-active/liquid-market claims
Standalone checker must validate generated or hand-reviewed deployment input bundles before hook redeploy and pool publication.
Generate target-chain official deployment inputs directly from the official Uniswap v4 deployments Markdown.
Keep Arc mainnet and Avalanche Fuji pending while official deployments are absent.
Populate Avalanche C-Chain and Arbitrum One from official deployments when present.
Reject self-deployed Arc testnet and Fuji rehearsal PoolManager reuse.
Self-test must prove current-docs pending behavior, standalone checker compatibility, future all-target manifest-update failure, and self-deployed PoolManager rejection.
Validate source hook low-14 permission bits before target-chain remine/redeploy.
Validate FxHedgeHook, FxSwapHook, and TelaranaGatewayHubHook deploy script prerequisites.
Keep Arc mainnet and Avalanche Fuji pending while official PoolManager addresses are absent.
For Avalanche and Arbitrum One, use only the official Uniswap PoolManager from the manifest.
Reject self-deployed Arc testnet and Fuji rehearsal PoolManager reuse.
Print no-broadcast target-chain command templates for the hook redeploy operator.
Keep target-chain hook pool indexing pending until broadcast, initialize, first-liquidity, StateView, subgraph, Quoter, and Universal Router execution evidence exists.
Parse the official Uniswap v4 deployments Markdown by network section.
Avalanche C-Chain official contract addresses must match the local manifest.
Arbitrum One official contract addresses must match the local manifest.
Arc mainnet must remain pending unless the official docs list Arc.
Avalanche Fuji must remain pending unless the official docs list Fuji.
Any official contract address drift must fail the check.
Self-test must prove fixture-based current docs pass, Arc/Fuji newly published fixtures fail, and official address drift fails.
Each target chain status must match official v4 address availability.
Official pool records must use the target chain official PoolManager.
Self-deployed Arc testnet and Fuji rehearsal PoolManagers must be rejected.
Official hook addresses must preserve low-14 permission bits.
Official poolIds must derive from the target-chain official PoolKey.
Fill plan must derive all target-chain publication records from the 11 source Arc testnet pool templates.

Ready claims require initialize tx, first-liquidity tx, StateView evidence, subgraph evidence, exact-input Quoter evidence, Universal Router execution evidence or a documented custom-route caveat, and live target-chain PoolManager receipt verification.

Self-test must prove populated draft Avalanche/Arbitrum fixtures validate per-target pool counts, ready mode requires live target-chain RPC receipts, self-deployed PoolManagers are rejected, and missing router/quoter evidence fails.
Each target chain StateView address must come from official Uniswap v4 deployments.
Ready or populated target records must read StateView.getSlot0(poolId) for every official pool.
Ready or populated target records must read StateView.getLiquidity(poolId) for every official pool.
StateView sqrtPriceX96, tick, and liquidity must match published pool evidence when provided.
Arc mainnet and Avalanche Fuji remain pending until official Uniswap v4 addresses and official pool IDs exist.
Each target chain must stay pending until official Uniswap v4 addresses and official PoolManager pool IDs exist.
Ready or populated target records must query the Uniswap v4 subgraph pool entity for every official pool.
Subgraph pool id, hooks, token0, token1, feeTier, and tickSpacing must match the target-chain PoolKey.
Subgraph sqrtPrice, tick, and liquidity must be present and match published evidence when provided.
Router-active indexed pool claims require nonzero subgraph liquidity unless the pool is explicitly not router-active.
Each target chain Quoter address must come from official Uniswap v4 deployments.
Ready or populated target records must carry exact-input Quoter evidence or an explicit custom-route caveat for every official pool.
Ready FxHedgeHook pool records must carry official exact-input Quoter evidence.
FxSwapHook and Gateway-backed routes must document direct quote, protocol-router, custom settlement, or Gateway attestation caveats when generic empty-hookData Quoter is not claimed.
Arc mainnet and Avalanche Fuji remain pending until official Uniswap v4 addresses and official pool IDs exist.
Each target chain Universal Router and Permit2 address must come from official Uniswap v4 deployments.
Ready or populated target records must carry Universal Router execution evidence or an explicit custom-route caveat for every official pool.
Permit2 approval requirements must be explicit for ERC20 exact-input routes.
Ready FxHedgeHook pool records must carry official Universal Router execution evidence.
FxSwapHook and Gateway-backed routes must document protocol-router, custom settlement, or Gateway attestation caveats when generic Universal Router execution is not claimed.
Arc mainnet and Avalanche Fuji remain pending until official Uniswap v4 addresses and official pool IDs exist.

claimPolicy: Avalanche and Arbitrum have official Uniswap v4 contract addresses, but fx-Telarana hook indexing still requires hook redeploy, PoolManager Initialize txs, first liquidity, StateView verification, subgraph verification, and exact-input Quoter diagnostics.
Avalanche Fuji is rehearsal-only until the official Uniswap deployments page lists Fuji v4 addresses.
Arc mainnet remains pending until the official Uniswap deployments page lists Arc v4 addresses.
Self-deployed Arc testnet and Fuji rehearsal PoolManagers must not be used for official Uniswap indexing claims.

demoableToday: All six FxHedgeHook poolIds initialized and configured on the self-deployed Arc testnet PoolManager
Vault-backed FxSwapHook direct quote/exact-input routes on the self-deployed Arc testnet PoolManager
Gateway-backed TelaranaGatewayHubHook demo route requiring Gateway hookData
doNotClaimYet: Official Uniswap Arc mainnet indexing, because official Arc v4 addresses are not published in the Uniswap deployments table as of 2026-06-08.
Official Uniswap Avalanche Fuji indexing, because official Fuji v4 addresses are not published in the Uniswap deployments table as of 2026-06-08 and the recorded Fuji PoolManager is rehearsal-only.

fx-Telarana hook indexing on Avalanche or Arbitrum, because official v4 contracts are known but protocol hooks still need chain-specific remine/redeploy, PoolManager Initialize txs, first liquidity, StateView verification, subgraph verification, and official Quoter diagnostics.
Router-active/liquid FxHedgeHook hedge markets, because first liquidity txs are not published yet and current in-range liquidity is zero.
Generic empty-hookData V4Quoter compatibility for FxSwapHook, because the local diagnostic proves this custom-accounting PMM requires the direct quote/protocol router path instead.
